scripts.server:stop: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5001 -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1).OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host ('Stopped process on port 5001 (PID ' + $p + ')') } else { Write-Host 'No server listening on port 5001' }"
scripts.server:restart: npm run server:stop && npm run server
scripts.lint: eslint client/src server/src shared scripts --ext js,jsx --report-unused-disable-directives --max-warnings 0
